painpoint.title: Do you have these troubles?
painpoint.quote: "We are present, but our minds are not focused."
painpoint.description: From online meetings, remote courses, business presentations, to cross-departmental communication, we are used to switching between meeting windows, Google, ChatGPT, and cloud drives. We look up information, take notes, and respond to messages, trying to multitask, but we are not really making progress.
painpoint.item1.title: Frequent window switching
painpoint.item2.title: Can't keep up with the pace
painpoint.item2.description: Unable to grasp the context in real time
painpoint.item3.title: Poor preparation
painpoint.item3.description: Unable to respond effectively in a timely manner
evidence.title: How does the research say?
evidence.quote: "92% of interviewee have multitasked during meetings."
evidence.description: Our brain doesn’t parallelize cognition. It takes ~25 minutes to fully resume the original task after an interruption
evidence.item1.title: check email
evidence.item2.title: send emails during meetings
evidence.item3.title: handle unrelated tasks
solution.title: Knovy: Your Smart Partner
solution.description: Knovy understands your current work content and needs, so you no longer need to switch windows to find information. At every moment you use your computer, it provides real-time transcription, summarizes the current situation, and suggests responses. Let you turn on the 'Knowledge Buff', greatly reducing the operational burden and focusing on the most core output.
solution.stage1.title: Before the meeting
solution.stage1.item1: Set meeting goals, topics, and members
solution.stage1.item2: Upload relevant documents (such as agendas and resumes)
solution.stage2.title: During the meeting
solution.stage3.title: After the meeting
integrations.title: Works with your favorite meeting software
integrations.description: Knovy runs in the background and seamlessly integrates with popular platforms like Google Meet, Zoom, Microsoft Teams, and Webex.
team.description: We are three students from National Taiwan University who have participated in some entrepreneurial projects. This time, we gathered together because of the 'NTU Nest' (the first entrepreneur and VC club in NTU). We started with voice and wanted to do real-time 'accent conversion and optimization AI'. After some research, we found that there are many such products on the market, and the technology is very mature. It is even just an 'affiliated function' of some conference AI. Therefore, for students, it is not a good starting point to enter the market now and start from scratch to develop difficult voice technology. Therefore, we are moving towards the direction of conference and interview AI assistance.
team.progress.item2: Collecting the first wave of user feedback and improving the product
team.progress.item3: Developing customers, participating in entrepreneurship competitions and seeking funding
team.progress.item4: Applying for a new type of application patent
demo.title: Try our web demo!
demo.start_prompt: Click "Start Recording" to activate the AI assistant and start recording.
demo.custom_prompt_placeholder: Enter a custom prompt or question...
demo.session_timeout_notice: The test experience will automatically stop after 5 minutes
demo.instructions.title: Instructions
demo.instructions.description: This version provides basic core functions to help you get a preliminary feel for our real-time voice analysis and interaction capabilities.
demo.instructions.recommendations.title: Usage Recommendations
demo.instructions.recommendations.item1: Please use a computer for operation
demo.instructions.recommendations.item1_: , to ensure stable functionality and a complete experience.
demo.instructions.recommendations.item2: It is recommended to use the Chrome browser
demo.instructions.recommendations.item2_: , and confirm that microphone and camera permissions are enabled.
demo.instructions.steps.title: Operating Steps
demo.instructions.steps.item1_descriptio: The system will ask you to select a screen source and allow the use of the microphone and camera.
demo.instructions.steps.item2_descriptio: Start talking to the camera, or play any voice/video content.
demo.instructions.steps.item3_descriptio: Observe the real-time transcript, click on keywords, or use the AI action buttons on the right.
demo.instructions.features.title: Feature Introduction
demo.instructions.features.intro: When you start talking, Knovy will:
demo.instructions.features.item2_part3: below, which can be clicked to search.
demo.instructions.features.item3_intro: Provide 3 interactive toolbar functions that can be clicked to use:
demo.instructions.features.item3_action1: : Automatically generate responses based on the content.
demo.instructions.features.item3_action2: : Summarize the key points of the recent passage.
demo.instructions.features.item3_action3: : Extend the search for related information.
demo.instructions.features.outro: You can also enter any prompt in the input box to ask questions or give commands freely.
demo.instructions.scenarios.title: Usage Scenarios
demo.instructions.scenarios.intro: The following are recommended usage scenarios, you can also use them freely:
demo.instructions.scenarios.item1_title: Play a video in the background + talk to yourself
demo.instructions.scenarios.item1_desc: Play a video with sound (such as a speech, course, or Podcast), ask questions while watching the transcript change, and try using the three functions.
demo.instructions.scenarios.item2_desc: Chat with friends or talk to yourself, share recent events or discuss news, observe how Knovy processes content in real time, and test the function buttons.
demo.ai_error: [AI Error] Failed to process your request. Please check your network connection or try again later. Poor audio quality may also cause processing to fail.
demo.keyword_explanation_error: [Error] Failed to get an explanation for {keyword}. Please check your network connection or try again later.
demo.system_audio_error: Could not capture system audio, recording will only include microphone. To record system audio, please make sure to check the share audio option when sharing your screen.
demo.prompt.answer: Based on the dialogue in the recent audio, answer the last question asked in the audio. As there will be two types of audio, one from the microphone and one from the system, please answer the question from the microphone audio first, then the system audio. If necessary, please search online.
demo.prompt.summary: Provide a concise summary of the dialogue captured in the recent audio clip. Please answer in the language of the audio. If there is no dialogue to summarize in the microphone audio, you do not need to answer for that audio.
demo.prompt.search: Based on the topics discussed in the recent audio clip, suggest relevant search keywords or find related information. Please answer in the language of the audio. If there is no dialogue to search in the microphone audio, you do not need to answer for that audio.
demo.prompt.custom: Analyze the dialogue captured in the recent audio clip based on the following requirements. Please answer in the language of the audio.
demo.display_prompt.answer: Answer questions based on voice content
demo.display_prompt.summary: Generate a summary based on past voice content
demo.display_prompt.search: Search for topics based on voice content
demo.keyword_explanation.prompt: Please explain this technical term in a simple and easy-to-understand way: {keyword}

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
terms.acceptance.p1: Welcome to Knovy ("the Service"). These Terms of Service ("Terms") constitute a legally binding agreement between you and us. By using the Service or accessing our website, you agree to be bound by these Terms.
terms.serviceDescription.title: 2. Description of Service
terms.serviceDescription.p1: The Service provides a tool for real-time screen and audio analysis, featuring:
terms.serviceDescription.l1: Real-time transcription of system and microphone audio.
terms.serviceDescription.l2: AI-powered screen content analysis and interaction.
terms.serviceDescription.l3: Secure storage of your session history and transcripts.
terms.userObligations.title: 3. User Obligations and Conduct
terms.userObligations.p1: To use the Service, you must register for an account. You agree to:
terms.userObligations.l1: Provide accurate and complete information during registration.
terms.userObligations.l2: Safeguard your account credentials and be solely responsible for all activities under your account.
terms.userObligations.l3: Be responsible for all content you process using the Service.
terms.userObligations.l4: Notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account or breach of security.
terms.usageRestrictions.title: 4. Usage Restrictions
terms.usageRestrictions.l1: Violate any applicable laws or regulations.
terms.usageRestrictions.l2: Use the Service to infringe on the intellectual property rights of others.
terms.usageRestrictions.l3: Attempt to disrupt, reverse engineer, or compromise the integrity of the Service.
terms.usageRestrictions.l4: Use the Service for any commercial purpose without our express written consent.
terms.intellectualProperty.title: 5. Intellectual Property
terms.intellectualProperty.p1: The Service and all its related content (including software, design, text, and images) are protected by copyright and other intellectual property laws. We grant you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use the Service.
terms.intellectualProperty.p2: You retain full ownership of the content you generate. By using the service, you grant us the necessary permissions to process this content on your behalf to provide the Service's features.
terms.privacy.title: 6. Privacy Protection
terms.privacy.p1: We are committed to protecting your privacy. For details on how we collect, use, and protect your data, please see our <1>Privacy Policy</1>.
terms.serviceChanges.title: 7. Service Modifications and Termination
terms.serviceChanges.p1: We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or terminate the Service at any time, with or without notice. We may also terminate your access for violating these Terms. Upon termination, your right to use the Service will cease immediately.
terms.disclaimer.title: 8. Disclaimer of Warranties
terms.disclaimer.p1: The Service is provided "as is" and "as available" without any warranties, express or implied. We do not guarantee the accuracy, reliability, or suitability of the Service for your needs. Your use of the Service is at your own risk.
terms.liability.title: 9. Limitation of Liability
terms.liability.p1: To the fullest extent permitted by law, we shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use or inability to use the Service.
terms.governingLaw.title: 10. Governing Law
terms.governingLaw.p1: These terms and conditions are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Taiwan, R.O.C., and you irrevocably submit to the exclusive jurisdiction of the Taipei District Court as the court of first instance.
terms.termsChanges.title: 11. Changes to Terms
terms.termsChanges.p1: We may update these Terms from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes. Your continued use of the Service after such changes constitutes your acceptance of the new Terms.
terms.contact.title: 12. Contact Information
terms.contact.p1: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at: inteviaai@gmail.com
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.overview.title: 1. Overview of Privacy Policy
privacy.overview.p1: We take your privacy very seriously. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your personal data when you use the Knovy application. By using our Service, you agree to the practices described in this Privacy Policy.
privacy.dataCollection.title: 2. Data We Collect
privacy.dataCollection.userProvided.l1: Account Information: When you register, we collect your email address and name.
privacy.dataCollection.userProvided.l2: User Settings: We store your preferences, such as language and interface settings.
privacy.dataCollection.userProvided.p1: This information is stored securely on our servers and is necessary for providing and personalizing the service.
privacy.dataCollection.automated.title: 2.2. Automatically Collected Data
privacy.dataCollection.automated.p1: We may collect anonymous usage data to improve our Service, such as feature usage frequency and performance metrics.
privacy.dataCollection.content.title: 2.3. Data Processed on Your Behalf
privacy.dataCollection.content.p1: When you use the service, we process screen and audio content to provide real-time analysis. This content is sent to our secure backend and to the Google Gemini API for processing. We may store transcripts and session metadata associated with your account to provide you with a session history.
privacy.dataUsage.title: 3. Purpose of Data Use
privacy.dataUsage.p1: We use your data for the following purposes:
privacy.dataUsage.l1: To provide, maintain, and improve our Service.
privacy.dataUsage.l2: To provide you with a history of your sessions, including transcripts and summaries.
privacy.dataUsage.l3: To generate AI-powered summaries and insights via the Google Gemini API.
privacy.dataUsage.l4: To personalize your user experience based on your settings.
privacy.dataUsage.l5: To provide customer support and troubleshoot issues.
privacy.dataUsage.l6: To monitor for security purposes and fraud prevention.
privacy.dataSharing.title: 4. Data Sharing and Disclosure
privacy.dataSharing.p1: We are committed to not selling your personal data. We only share your data in the following situations:
privacy.dataSharing.l1: With Third-Party Services: We send processed content to Google's Generative AI services to provide analysis. Google's use of your data is governed by their own privacy policy.
privacy.dataSharing.l2: To Comply with Legal Obligations: If required by law or a court order.
privacy.dataSharing.l3: To Protect Our Rights: To protect our rights, property, or safety, and that of our users.
privacy.security.title: 5. Data Security
privacy.security.p1: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data. All communication with our servers is encrypted. However, no method of electronic storage is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.
privacy.userRights.title: 6. Your Rights
privacy.userRights.p1: You have full control over your data:
privacy.userRights.l1: Access and Correction: You can access and update your account information directly within the application.
privacy.userRights.l2: Data Deletion: You can manage and delete your session history from within the application. To delete your entire account, please contact us.
privacy.cookies.title: 7. Use of Cookies
privacy.cookies.p1: We do not use cookies for tracking on our website. The application uses secure tokens for authentication.
privacy.thirdParty.title: 8. Third-Party Services
privacy.thirdParty.p1: Our Service relies on integration with Supabase for authentication and Google Gemini for AI features. These third parties have their own privacy policies, and we are not responsible for their privacy practices. We recommend you review their policies.
privacy.policyChanges.title: 9. Policy Changes
privacy.policyChanges.p1: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes via a notice within the application or on our website. We recommend you periodically review this policy.
privacy.contact.title: 10. Contact Us
privacy.contact.p1: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at: inteviaai@gmail.com
